headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 27, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox secured a 5-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Connelly Early earning the win. Aroldis Chapman earned the save, striking out two batters in a scoreless inning. The Philadelphia Phillies suffered a 6-2 defeat at the hands of the Atlanta Braves, with Chris Sale earning the win after 6.0 innings of scoreless relief. Matt Olson led the Braves' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups and rotations. Logan O'Hoppe, the Los Angeles Angels' catcher, has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left wrist fracture. The Chicago Cubs' Riley Martin has been placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 24, 2026, with left elbow inflammation. Connor Seabold of the Detroit Tigers has been placed on the 15-day injured list with left ankle inflammation.

The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired in a trade with the Texas Rangers for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings. The Chicago Cubs acquired 3B Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies for cash. The Houston Astros traded RHP Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for SS Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Take Down Orioles 5-3**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 5-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Connelly Early earning the win. Aroldis Chapman earned the save, striking out two batters in a scoreless inning.

top_news.title: **Phillies Fall to Braves in 6-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies suffered a 6-2 defeat at the hands of the Atlanta Braves, with Chris Sale earning the win after 6.0 innings of scoreless relief. Matt Olson led the Braves' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Guardians 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a 2-4 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Jesús Sánchez leading the offense with a home run and 3 RBIs. Colin Holderman pitched 1.1 scoreless innings in relief for the Blue Jays.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Reds 8-3**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured an 8-3 victory over the Cincinnati Reds, with Gleyber Torres leading the charge at the plate. Torres hit 3 home runs, including a key two-run homer that helped seal the win.

top_news.title: **Logan O'Hoppe Sidelined with Left Wrist Fracture**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels catcher Logan O'Hoppe has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left wrist fracture. The injury occurred on April 26, 2026.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired in a trade with the Texas Rangers for cash.
